title: ChainCreated payload
description: Emitted when a new chain is filed via forge(schema_name='chain', ...). Captures the create-time field values; mirrors the chain forge-schema. The skeleton task rows that the chain_insert_task_skeletons_from_field hook creates emit their own TaskCreated events as cascade-emits — each with refs.caused_by_event_id pointing at this ChainCreated.

output.description: One sentence — what exists when this chain is complete. Mirrors chain.toml's output.

design_decisions.description: Key design choices and their rationale. Mirrors chain.toml's design_decisions. Distinct from envelope.rationale: this is the durable design record; envelope.rationale is the per-event answer to 'why this event'.

completion_condition.description: Observable state — what is true when the chain is done. Checkable without judgment. Mirrors chain.toml.

tasks.description: Initial task entries (pipe-delimited per chain.toml convention) or empty for chains that follow up with per-task forge calls. The cascade TaskCreated events carry the per-task data; tasks here is the create-time string for reference.
